metadata.description: Eastbase Studio's Claude Code plugins — shared agent tooling across all eastbase products.

plugins.name: eastbase
plugins.description: Eastbase Studio's shared agent tooling. Ships eastbase-premium-ui (the house standard for premium, personality-rich product UI), eastbase-review-pr (the Eastbase product/SaaS/risk review overlay for PRs, diffs, and agent-generated changes), eastbase-launch-check (the practical pre-launch / go-live readiness gate for eastbase products), and eastbase-blog-post (the Eastbase writing taste layer for practical, honest, product-led blog and long-form content).
